text:
Annual: October 2010-2024
Monthly*: 2025 and 2026
*Data is only available to CCW VRDC users, and cannot be shipped.
The years listed reflect the most recent full year available from the CCW. MDS data from CMS can typically be requested within three months of the target date. The version of the MDS changed from 2.0 to 3.0 on 10/01/2010. The 4th quarter of 2010 data will be version 3.0.
Date Requests Can Be Accepted for Upcoming Releases: 
Annual: 2025 may be requested after 2/1/2027
